method_summary: The paper presents a multi-tier labeling cascade that combines three weak supervision sources (physics rule set, IMM-UKF bank, and supplemental-element calibration) to produce labels at scale, followed by training a 6.5M-parameter Transformer in two stages for orbital anomaly detection.
key_innovation: A multi-tier labeling cascade that composes three weak supervision sources of increasing fidelity to produce labels at a scale unavailable from any single source.
limitations_stated: The model is framed as a high-recall triage classifier for surfacing candidate events, not for issuing final attributions
title: Multi-Tier Labeling and Physics-Informed Learning for Orbital Anomaly Detection at Scale
